label: PASS
rationale: The range was set with read/write locks enabled, ReadLocked and WriteLocked false, and LockOnReset {0}; after a PowerCycle, LockOnReset requires the locked columns to become true while preserving {0}, which matches the returned cells 7=true, 8=true, 9=[0].

label: FAIL
rationale: The range was set with read/write locks enabled, unlocked, and LockOnReset {0}; a PowerCycle is a matching reset, so recovery should set the locked columns true and preserve LockOnReset, but the target Get reports cells 7=false and 8=false.

label: FAIL
rationale: After the range is configured with ReadLockEnabled true and LockOnReset {0}, the PowerCycle should make ReadLocked true; with read locking enabled and ReadLocked true, the TPer shall not allow host reads of user data, so a successful Read of LBA 80-87 is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: After the range is configured with WriteLockEnabled true and LockOnReset {0}, the PowerCycle should make WriteLocked true; with write locking enabled and WriteLocked true, the TPer shall not allow host writes of user data, so a successful Write of LBA 80-87 is not compliant.
